name: jeopardy-game
description: Welcome to the Jeopardy Game project! This project consists of a web application and a mobile companion app that allows users to play a game inspired by the classic quiz show, Jeopardy.

scripts.start:clients: concurrently -k -n WEB,COMPANION -c cyan,magenta "npm run start:web" "npm run start:companion"
scripts.start:all: concurrently -k -n SERVER,WEB,COMPANION -c green,cyan,magenta "npm run start:server" "npm run start:web" "npm run start:companion"
